lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow! look at this place, it's so colourful.

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: Why thank you. Can I help you with anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I take it by the clothes you are wearing and this room that you are in the dye trade?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: How observant of you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you make dyes for me please?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: What colour dye do you want? I can make you blue, red or yellow dyes for you. If you bring me the correct raw materials.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need to make red dye?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: Hmm.... 3 lots of redberries should do the trick and 25 coins should cover any other costs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok make me some red dye please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I have all the ingredients yet.

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: You know what you need to get, now come back when you have them. Goodbye for now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can do without dye at that price.

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: Fair enough, I still think that the price is fairly reasonable considering that I'm the only source of dye this side of the Shantay pass.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where would I find a redberry bush?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: Well you could try growing them. They shouldn't be too hard to grow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I didn't care to grow my own, where else could I get some?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: Well I know for sure that the desert climate wouldn't suit them. I have mine picked for me in the woods south of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need to make yellow dye?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: Yellow is an awkward colour to recreate, I guess if you got me 2 onions I could use their skins to make a warm yellow dye for you. Oh yes and lest I forget I'll need 25 coins to cover the cost of the glass ware and

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: my wages.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok make me some yellow dye please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where could I find some onions?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: Generally you would find onions in vegetable gardens, silly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok you have me there but is there anywhere around here where I could get my hands on some onions?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: I really don't know. A friend of mine grows hers on a farms near Draynor village. But that's a little far from here to be useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need to make blue dye?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: To make a bottle of blue dye I'll need 2 woad leaves and 25 coins from you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok make me some blue dye please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I get some woad leaves?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: Woad leaves are fairly rare. My other customers tell me there's a gardener in Falador who grows them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, I don't think that I need some dye right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you get into the colour business?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: Well, it's quite simple really my mother was a drysalter and I learnt the trade from her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm, what's a drysalter, it isn't a medical condition is it?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: No silly, it's someone who deals with preservatives and dyes. I didn't really enjoy the preservative side of things so I've chosen to deal solely in dyeing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how's business then?

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: It's a dyeing trade! Oh gosh, I'm sorry, that was a truly dreadful joke.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm yes, about the worst I've heard today at least.

lines.speaker: Ali the dyer
lines.text: Thanks. But really, it's not the best around here, nearly everyone in this town wears only white, which means I don't exactly do a roaring trade. Now is there anything I can get you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'm just having a look around.
